display.purpose: Tab page titles, one per screen. Playfair Display only appears on headings and bean names.

body.purpose: All data, numbers, buttons, labels. Inputs are 16px minimum to prevent iOS zoom-on-focus.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition for hover, focus, and state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Espresso Ink on cream — the default action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; background: #2C1810; color: #F5F0E8; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3D2820; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(44,24,16,0.08), 0 1px 3px rgba(44,24,16,0.06); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Amber Button
components.description: The warm CTA for add-bean and log-shot moments.
components.css: .ds-btn-amber { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; background: #D4A574; color: #2C1810; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-amber:hover { background: #B8864E; color: #fff; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 12px 16px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; background: transparent; color: #6B5B4E; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(44,24,16,0.04); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Card-white field with amber focus glow — the system's only glow.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; min-height: 44px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(44,24,16,0.12); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: #2C1810; background: #fff; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #D4A574; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(212,165,116,0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9B8B7E; }

components.name: Stepper
components.description: Signature numeric input: [−][value][+] in one bordered container, 44px tap zones.
components.css: .ds-stepper { display: flex; align-items: center; border: 1.5px solid rgba(44,24,16,0.12); border-radius: 10px; background: #fff; overflow: hidden; max-width: 160px; } .ds-stepper-btn { width: 44px; min-height: 44px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #2C1810; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-stepper-btn:hover { background: rgba(44,24,16,0.06); } .ds-stepper-input { flex: 1; min-width: 0; padding: 12px 8px; border: none; border-left: 1.5px solid rgba(44,24,16,0.08); border-right: 1.5px solid rgba(44,24,16,0.08); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: #2C1810; background: transparent; text-align: center; }

components.name: Bean Card
components.description: One bean per card: serif name, sans metadata, freshness badge.
components.html:
Ethiopia Yirgacheffe
Heart Roasters
Roasted Jun 28
At Peak · Day 14
components.css: .ds-bean-card { position: relative; background: #fff; border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(44,24,16,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(44,24,16,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(44,24,16,0.07); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-bean-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(44,24,16,0.10), 0 2px 6px rgba(44,24,16,0.06); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-bean-card-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #2C1810; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-bean-card-roaster { font-size: 14px; color: #6B5B4E; } .ds-bean-card-date { font-size: 12px; color: #9B8B7E; margin: 2px 0 10px; } .ds-badge-optimal { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background: rgba(123,160,91,0.12); color: #7BA05B; }

components.name: Quality Badge
components.description: State hue as text over the same hue at low opacity; label always names the state.
components.css: .ds-quality-great, .ds-quality-perfect, .ds-quality-okay, .ds-quality-bad { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-quality-great { background: rgba(79,111,165,0.14); color: #3F5A86; } .ds-quality-perfect { background: rgba(123,160,91,0.12); color: #7BA05B; } .ds-quality-okay { background: rgba(212,165,116,0.18); color: #B8864E; } .ds-quality-bad { background: rgba(160,105,91,0.12); color: #A0695B; }

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Fixed bottom espresso bar; active tab glows amber.
components.html: <nav class="ds-tabbar"><button class="ds-tab ds-tab-active">Home</button><button class="ds-tab">Beans</button><button class="ds-tab">Calendar</button><button class="ds-tab">Stats</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tabbar { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; align-items: center; background: #2C1810; height: 64px; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 -2px 20px rgba(44,24,16,0.15); } .ds-tab { background: none; border: none; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.5); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; padding: 8px 16px; min-width: 64px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #E8C9A0; } .ds-tab-active { color: #D4A574; }

narrative.overview: Coffee Journal looks and feels like a well-kept paper notebook that lives next to the espresso machine: warm pages, dark ink, exact numbers written in a steady hand. The palette is literal coffee — espresso ink on steamed-cream paper with caramel-amber accents — but the discipline is a working tool's, not a café's décor. Serif headings give the journal its handwritten warmth; DM Sans carries the data cleanly.
keyCharacteristics: Warm, calm, precise — café warmth carried by type and color, not ornament
Mobile-first single column (max 600px), thumb-reachable, 44px minimum targets
Semantic color: hue = state, never mood
Paper-like depth: espresso-tinted shadows, cards resting on cream
Subtle grain: a faint SVG noise texture keeps the cream from feeling sterile

rules.name: The One-Hue-Ink Rule
rules.body: All dark UI — text, nav, borders, shadows — derives from Espresso Ink (#2C1810). Pure black and cool gray are prohibited anywhere in the interface.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Amber is the only color allowed to be 'just accent'. Slate, leaf, clay, and blue may appear only when they encode freshness, quality, or a calendar bean identity.

rules.name: The Serif-Is-For-Names Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display appears only on headings and bean names. Data, numbers, buttons, and labels are always DM Sans. A serif number in this app is a bug.

rules.name: The Warm Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadow color is always rgba(44,24,16, α). A neutral black shadow is prohibited — it instantly cools the page and breaks the paper illusion.

dos: Do derive every dark pixel from Espresso Ink (#2C1810) — text, borders, shadows, nav.
Do keep touch targets at 44px minimum and form text at 16px; the user is standing at a machine.
Do pair every state color with a text label (freshness and quality are never color-only).
Do use SVG icons drawn in the ink color; keep them at 20–22px.
Do keep stats copy observational — facts, no cheering.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: hover lifts and pane transitions collapse to instant state changes.
donts: Don't ship fitness-app gamification: no streak flames, badges, confetti, progress rings, or records-to-beat.
Don't drift toward the generic SaaS dashboard: no cool grays, KPI hero cards, or sparklines-everywhere.
Don't go café-POS dense — one column, one card per record, generous padding.
Don't go Instagram-café twee: no script fonts, no decorative illustrations, no latte-art motifs.
Don't use emoji anywhere in the UI — icons are SVG, always.
Don't use pure black, cool-gray borders, or neutral black shadows; warmth is structural, not optional.
Don't remove substance while polishing: shot-card bars, blue 'Great', Home stat tiles, and portafilter-first ordering are intentional — restyle, never delete.
